_comment: 2AIO model auto-router rules. Task text is matched against keyword sets (JP+EN). Priority: opus (hard judgment) > haiku (mechanical) > sonnet (default). Signals can bump the tier. Budget-aware downgrade kicks in when the subscription 5h block is near its cap. Tune freely — pure data, no code change needed. Model aliases: haiku | sonnet | opus (Claude Code accepts these).

opus.reason: high-stakes judgment / architecture / complex multi-file / security

signals.many_files_regex: (全ファイル|across .*files|multiple files|複数ファイル|システム全体|entire codebase)
signals.quick_regex: (quick|simple|ちょっと|軽く|さっと|一言で)

budget._comment: When the subscription 5h block is near its cap, downgrade to save quota. budgetLeftFraction is 0..1 (remaining). Pass it in from ccusage/governor when available; if absent, no downgrade.
